posts.raw_content:
Original post.

https://patriots.win/p/1ASZR1tBgX/i-dont-know-all-of-the-specifics/

Update:

My father has pneumonia and a high fever.  Everything else looks good for a 94 year old man.  He will be admitted for observation and treatment.  Fortunately, it was not a heart attack or a stroke.  

I am not asking for medical advise or warnings about this medication or that medication, as those types of things have been discussed incessantly on here over the last few years.  

I just wanted to give an update and my heartfelt appreciation for all of the prayers and kind words.

God bless 🙌 you all.
posts.author: Landslide_2020
posts.title: For those that saw my earlier post about my dad being taken to the hospital by ambulance.  Thank you all for your prayers.  Here's an update I received from my sister.
posts.content:
Original post.

https://patriots.win/p/1ASZR1tBgX/i-dont-know-all-of-the-specifics/

Update:

My father has pneumonia and a high fever. Everything else looks good for a 94 year old man. He will be admitted for observation and treatment. Fortunately, it was not a heart attack or a stroke.

I am not asking for medical advise or warnings about this medication or that medication, as those types of things have been discussed incessantly on here over the last few years.

I just wanted to give an update and my heartfelt appreciation for all of the prayers and kind words.

God bless 🙌 you all.
